titleStmt.title: SII 7.198: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 198. (A.R. No. 30 of 1901). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyāt trailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . [1 .*] Oppuvatauḷavadēśado ḷirppudu jinadharmmadāgaraṁ tānene lō. kaprathitamāgi bhavyajanapriya muruvaibhavānvitaṁ vaṁśapuraṁ . [2 .*] Alliya jinā
layaṁgaḷa nellava natibhaktiyiṁda vaṁdipe nāneṁ . bullāsa modave baṁdaṁ phullaśarāgāra naṁṇasāmaṁtanṛpaṁ . [3 .*] Ātana kīrttihāraharahāsavinirmmalamūrtti vikramaṁ śrītanujātavairi gativismayadaṁ mati dēvamaṁtri giṁ.nētake mātu paṁcagu
rubhakti surēṁdrage dānasadguṇaṁ khyātiyanāṁta karnnagene baṁṇisalārggaḷa vaṁṇabhūpanaṁ . [4 .*] yiṁtu dharitriyoḷpesaranāṁtesevā mudirāḍi yaṁṇasāmaṁtanṛpālakaṁ tanage saṁtatasaukhyada vāṁcheyiṁ karaṁ . saṁtasamāge tatpu
rada pārśvajinēṁdrage caṁdranāthagaṁ saṁtatapūjeyaṁ jinamunīṁdrari gaṁnnavinūtadānamaṁ . [5 .*] svāṁtaviśuddhiyiṁdesagaleṁdiḷe bāppene koṭṭa nāniśākāṁtadivākaraṁ paramavṛttiya nātmajanāṁtamadhyadoḷ . kaṁtusadṛkṣakāya vi
rupākṣa samāhvaya rāyanājñeyiṁ tāṁ taḷedirppa viṭhṭarasabhūvarakāṁtanarājyakāladoḷ . [6 .*] Adeṁteṁdoḍe . śakavarṣa 1384 neya kharasaṁvatsarada kārttika śuddha 5 guruvāradalu cārukīrttipaṁḍitadēvarugaḷa nirūpadiṁda bi
direyanagarada yeṁṭu prajeseṭṭikāraru nālvaru yeḷamegaḷoḷagāda samasta halara Anumatiyiṁda bārakūrasthaḷada mudurāḍiya hosabu sāmaṁtaheggaḍeyara moṁmagaḷu beṁmakkasāmaṁtettiyara magaḷa
ha ceṁnakkabāṇaṁtitiyara maga Aṁṇasāmaṁtaheggaḍeyaru taṁna taṁmaṁdiru cōkisāmaṁtaru tirumasāmaṁtaru nālkūra Ayinūrusāviradavara voḍaṁbaḍikeyiṁda Arasaṁṇaheggaḍeyaru vidyebuddhiya kalisiddaṟiṁdalū tanage svarggā
pavarggaprāptinimittavāgi maṁgalūra sthaḷada bidireya dhaṇāyakarabastiya caṁḍōgrapārśvanāthana saṁnidhiyalli nityadalli naḍava siddhacakrārādhane ratnamāleya pūje tribhuvanacūḍāmaṇiyeṁba caityālayada śrīcaṁdraprabhasvāmiya saṁnidhiya
lli nityadalli naḍava paṁcāmṛtābhiṣēkāṣṭavidhārccane kārttika śuddha 1 Abhiṣēka pratimāsadalu Aydeneyalli naḍava vāra 1 śāstradāna yeṁbivakke yeḍaṁmāḍiya sīmeyoḷu caṁḍōgrapārśvatīrththakara caṁdraprabhasvāmiya muṁ
de hiraṇyōdakadhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṭṭa vṛttiya vivara . maṇikeya bayala bīraṇakabeya lakumasāṇi koḍuva gēṇi Akki hāne 40 ṟa lekkada mūḍe 46 kokka beṭṭina tirumaḍaha koḍuva gēṇi yakki mūḍe 25 guḷiṁciya bayalalu bīraṇa koṁja ko
ḍuva gēṇi Akki mūḍe 23 nelliya biḷirarāma bittuva bayalugaḷa gēṇi Akki mūḍe 10 Aṁtu mū 104 mūḍe Akkiya dharmmavanu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi māḍi bahaḷada puṇyavanu kīrttiyanu vupārjjisikoṁḍaru . yi dharmmavanu Akhaṁḍitavāgi naḍasi
koḍuvaṁthāvaru halaru seṭṭikāṟaru . yi dharmmaśāsanakke Aḷupidaṁthāvaru vujjaṁtagiriyalli sāvira jinabiṁbava naḷida dōṣakke hōharu . vāraṇāśiyalli sāvira kapileyanu vadhisida dōṣakke hōharu . Aḷupabēkeṁdu nenadavaru yī bhūmiyu
ḷḷakālakke narakaduḥkhava nuṁbaru . yiṁtī śāsanada vakkhavaṇeya Aṁṇa sāmaṁtaheggaḍeyara sēnabava dēvarasara baraha . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēcca vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭiṁ varṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī . varddhatāṁ jainaśāsanaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 7.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
